command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
BRIDGE=/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge
ORIGINAL_SHA=c7aa6ec73363819ac6bbeff3acbb5f9091cd7b483c0d7c3408c673f752332a06
CURRENT_SHA=$(sha256sum $BRIDGE | cut -d" " -f1)
echo "Original SHA: $ORIGINAL_SHA"
echo "Current  SHA: $CURRENT_SHA"
if [ "$CURRENT_SHA" = "$ORIGINAL_SHA" ]; then
    echo "SHA MATCH: bridge is back to original"
else
    echo "SHA MISMATCH - something wrong"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== CLEAN UP SCRATCH FILES ==="
rm -f /home/jose/fix_bridge.py
rm -f /home/jose/read_bridge.py /home/jose/read_bridge2.py
rm -f /home/jose/diag*.py /home/jose/read_gmail.py
rm -f /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge.pre-async-fix
echo "scratch files removed"
' 2>&1

echo "=== N8N GMAIL WORKFLOW UNCHANGED ==="
python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect('/home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute("SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity WHERE id='ftZLisyAbKmZI1RH'")
r = cur.fetchone()
print('workflow:', r)
conn.close()
"

echo DONE_2023
